allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const code=fs.readFileSync\('moves.js','utf8'\); eval\(code\); const keys=Object.keys\(MOVES\); console.log\('Total moves:', keys.length\); console.log\('Special moves:'\); ['dragon-darts','surging-strikes','triple-axel','flower-trick','hex','venoshock','facade','brine','bullet-seed'].forEach\(k=>{if\(MOVES[k]\){const m=MOVES[k]; const extra=Object.keys\(m\).filter\(f=>!['name','type','category','power','note'].includes\(f\)\); console.log\(' '+k+':', extra.length?extra.join\(','\):'\(standard\)'\);} else console.log\(' '+k+': MISSING!'\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const code=fs.readFileSync\('moves.js','utf8'\); const fn = new Function\(code + '; return MOVES;'\); const MOVES = fn\(\); const keys=Object.keys\(MOVES\); console.log\('Total moves:', keys.length\); ['dragon-darts','surging-strikes','triple-axel','flower-trick','hex','venoshock','facade','brine','bullet-seed'].forEach\(k=>{if\(MOVES[k]\){const m=MOVES[k]; const extra=Object.keys\(m\).filter\(f=>!['name','type','category','power','note'].includes\(f\)\); console.log\(k+':', extra.length?extra.join\(','\):'standard'\);} else console.log\(k+': MISSING!'\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const code=fs.readFileSync\('moves.js','utf8'\); const fn = new Function\(code + '; return MOVES;'\); const MOVES = fn\(\); const keys=Object.keys\(MOVES\); const total=keys.length; const hitCount=keys.filter\(k=>MOVES[k].hitCount\).length; const hitMinMax=keys.filter\(k=>MOVES[k].hitMin\).length; const alwaysCrit=keys.filter\(k=>MOVES[k].alwaysCrit\).length; const tripleAxel=keys.filter\(k=>MOVES[k].tripleAxel\).length; const condPower=keys.filter\(k=>MOVES[k].conditionalPower\).length; const status=keys.filter\(k=>MOVES[k].category==='status'\).length; const physical=keys.filter\(k=>MOVES[k].category==='physical'\).length; const special=keys.filter\(k=>MOVES[k].category==='special'\).length; console.log\('=== moves.js summary ==='\); console.log\('Total:', total, '\(329 usable + 2 forms = OK if ~331\)'\); console.log\('Status moves:', status\); console.log\('Physical moves:', physical\); console.log\('Special moves:', special\); console.log\('hitCount \(fixed multi\):', hitCount\); console.log\('hitMin/Max \(2-5 hit\):', hitMinMax\); console.log\('alwaysCrit:', alwaysCrit\); console.log\('tripleAxel:', tripleAxel\); console.log\('conditionalPower:', condPower\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const code=fs.readFileSync\('moves.js','utf8'\); const fn = new Function\(code + '; return MOVES;'\); const MOVES = fn\(\); const keys=Object.keys\(MOVES\); const expected329=['accelerock','acid-armor','acid-spray','acrobatics','aerial-ace','agility','air-cutter','air-slash','amnesia','ancient-power','aqua-jet','aqua-ring','aqua-tail','aura-sphere','aurora-beam','aurora-veil','avalanche']; const missing=expected329.filter\(k=>!MOVES[k]\); console.log\('Sample check missing:', missing.length===0?'all present':missing\);")
